item.title: Random pixels to enjoy
item.description:
Oh right, I had to edit this one for discord bc the community filter thought the baby's giant head was a boob.
Snail tax
item.dc:creator: ifyouwanttoknowmoreaboutparanoidpeoplejustfollowthemaround

item.title: 19 February
item.description: I try to post this every year because I believe that we can not grow as a country with out confronting our past. America has always been at war with itself and we have stumbled just as often as we have stride. I love my country, but I also believe that she can improve. Never stop fighting for justice.
item.dc:creator: sevenfingerman

item.title: Day 267: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Jack of All Trades Ground Chuck Angus Beef Patty, Bacon, Chipotle Mayo, Avocado, Pico De Gallo, French Fries & 3 Pepper Colby Jack Cheese From Serial Grillers in Tucson, AZ Previous Day 266: https://imgur.com/gallery/2RsYjCb MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD

458 https://www.washingtonian.com/2021/02/19/trump-hotel-employees-tell-all-what-it-was-really-like-serving-right-wing-elite
458 . . There's never any appreciation for fathers/husband http://imgur.com/a/2TRlcFm . . Car Advice Mallard http://imgur.com/a/C7u2g28 . . General Readiness/Preparedness during an Emergency http://imgur.com/a/pgFtbKv

item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: 80 years ago today...
item.description:
I read this meme differently.
Because I know the truth.
It happened in Europe, it happened here too.
...more recently than we want to remember.
It can happen here again.
item.dc:creator: jansenart

item.title: To the dads killing it.
item.description: Having a child is like having your heart walking around exposed to the world. A dad will do what we must to keep them alive and happy, and there isn't a joy greater. Edit: sauce https://youtu.be/8PstSiTCk74

2
3

https://donorbox.org/j6

item.title: Aaaaand here we go again !
item.description: Jean-Luc Brunel, good friend of Jeffrey Epstein and Maxwell, was found dead in his cell this morning in Paris. He was found hanged. He was accused of rapes on minor girls and sexual harassment, an investigation is underway.

item.title: Why can't America be like other countries?
item.description: American restaurants will tell you that to pay staff appropriately, the cost of food will "drastically" go up. I'm calling BS on that. Chesapeake people appropriately and if they do a fantastic job, we will give them some additional money but don't make it mandatory on us to do your responsibility, just pay them correctly
item.dc:creator: MissySassy
